Precision Analytics — Series B startup ($35M raised), 120 employees. Builds real-time analytics dashboards for e-commerce companies. Key product: ShopInsight, which processes 50M events/day. Revenue: $8M ARR, 40% growth. Pain points: scaling their ML pipeline costs, customer data compliance in EU markets. ICP: VP of Data at mid-market retailers. Currently using Mixpanel + custom tools.
Note: This company uses multiple cloud providers and has a complex procurement process.

Global Logistics Corp — Public company (NYSE: GLC), 12,000 employees. Manages freight and supply chain for Fortune 1000 clients. Technology spend: $180M/year. Current initiative: AI-powered route optimization. Pain points: legacy ERP integration, real-time tracking accuracy, driver communication. Decision cycle: 9-18 months. Requires SOC 2, ISO 27001.
Note: This company uses multiple cloud providers and has a complex procurement process.
